Privacy

Privacy

This portfolio does not ship third-party telemetry by default. The integrated preference control stores a small local setting in the browser so the cookie experience feels built in rather than outsourced. External destinations such as LinkedIn, GitHub, and the hosted resume follow their own privacy policies.

© 2026 Kaizer Charania

Privacy Terms

Preferences

This portfolio stores a small local preference so the cookie controls feel integrated instead of outsourced.
